item.title: About
item.description: Hey there My name is Gisele, I’m currently a rising senior at the University of Washington graduating with a degree in informatics. I grew up in Seattle but my family moved to Italy when I was 8. We spent 4 1/2 years there as me and my younger brother settled into the local Italian schools and soccer teams What is Informatics? Here is some markdown including a link.

item.title: Things I Like
item.description: …in my day tea with a glob of fancy honey sunscreen and sunny walks knitting in a park while listening to my knitting in a park playlist test ISBN Title Price 3476896 My first HTML $53 test …on my tiktok for you page Poet Square Cats - An Arizona based cat colony headed by Sad Boy and Lola. The gal who runs this account is incredible at keeping everybody updated on the progress of each cat no matter how momentous or casual the day is.
